note_on_data: Built the overlay render snapshot eval (GlyphTests target + OverlaySnapshotTests.swift) to close the F4 render blind-spot the loop-audit surfaced. All 6 defects below were build/test-infra setup friction (xcodegen/Xcode test-host sharp edges), born+caught at the build stage, ZERO escaped to the user. Guard proven to fire empirically (overlay narrowed to 248 → 3 containment tests fail with required>248; reverted to 336 → 6/6 pass).

architecture.note: mirror-probe measurement (views apply fixed .frame internally → measure real components unframed via NSHostingView.fittingSize) + ImageRenderer smoke; isolated .build_dd, hardened-off test host

build.note: 6 iterations to wire the test target (see defects) — all engine/test-host constraints, none product-code

qa.note: 6/6 tests pass; guard empirically proven to fire (248→3 fail, 336→pass)

defects.title: build-for-testing built universal → x86_64 slice fails (MLX is arm64-only)
defects.root_cause: no arch constraint on the test build

defects.title: GlyphTests empty module name (invalid identifier)
defects.root_cause: PRODUCT_NAME/PRODUCT_MODULE_NAME unset on the test target

defects.title: @testable import Glyph unresolved (module not testable)
defects.root_cause: ENABLE_TESTABILITY not set on the app (Debug default didn't apply under -O)

defects.title: test target re-linked SPM packages → MLXLMCommon missing transitive Hub symbols
defects.root_cause: listed WhisperKit/MLX as direct test-target deps; should resolve from host via BUNDLE_LOADER

defects.title: undefined internal Glyph symbols at link (no test host)
test .xctest won't load into host (hardened-runtime library validation rejects team-less self-signed bundle)
defects.root_cause: host app has hardened runtime; library validation requires team match — team-less self-signed bundle fails (reported as 'different Team IDs')

notes: render-containment now has an ENFORCED guard (the snapshot eval at Gate-E), not just a Gate-C checklist line — it joins promoted_guards_that_held this run, closing the F3 instrumentation gap. All 6 setup defects were engine/test-host constraints (arm64/testability/test-host/hardened-runtime), born+caught at build, 0 escaped. The build wiring + reasoning is baked into project.yml and _build_check.sh comments so it's self-documenting. Escape-rate returns to 0 after the v1.1.2 render spike — and now the render class has a real gate. Known limitation: containment checks use mirror probes (extract a shared unframed content view for zero-drift = open).
